text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just before the Takarazuka Kinen, Meisho Doto
comes into the prep room.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She talks about her lack of confidence, her
respect for Admire Vega, and her admiration of
T.M. Opera O.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, she declares that she'll defeat Admire
Vega and become T.M. Opera O's rival herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But Admire Vega can't lose either. This is the
spring Grand Prix, a race sure to make her sister
proud.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With each runner carrying their own hopes and
dreams, the curtain rises over the Takarazuka
Kinen.
